_note: Tobi slug aliases: a SOURCE spelling (left) → the app's canonical roster slug (right). Sources (esp. PTO) sometimes spell a name differently than our roster. When Tobi stages an 'unknown slug', Dominik maps it here ONCE and it auto-resolves forever after — the exception-handling loop from docs/robot-fleet.md. Only ever map a genuine same-person spelling; never map two different athletes together.
